H1100.derivation: from H1097 (בְּלִי) and H3276 (יַעַל);(often in connection with H376 (אִישׁ), H802 (אִשָּׁה), H1121 (בֵּן), etc.)
H1100.strongs_def: without profit, worthlessness; by extension, destruction, wickedness

H1101.derivation: a primitive root; (also  denominatively from H1098 (בְּלִיל)) to fodder
H1101.strongs_def: to overflow (specifically with oil.); by implication, to mix; to fodder
H1101.kjv_def: anoint, confound, [idiom] fade, mingle, mix (self), give provender, temper.

H1103.strongs_def: to pinch sycamore figs (a process necessary to ripen them)

H1104.strongs_def: to make away with (specifically by swallowing); generally, to destroy
H1104.kjv_def: cover, destroy, devour, eat up, be at end, spend up, swallow down (up).

H1105.kjv_def: devouring, that which he hath swallowed up.

H1106.strongs_def: Bela, the name of a place, also of an Edomite and of two Israelites
H1106.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H1107.derivation: or בַּלְעֲדֵי; constructive plural from H1077 (בַּל) and H5703 (עַד), not till, i.e. (as preposition or adverb)

H1108.strongs_def: a Belaite (collectively) or descendants of Bela

H1109.derivation: probably from H1077 (בַּל) and H5971 (עַם); not (of the) people, i.e. foreigner;
H1109.strongs_def: Bilam, a Mesopotamian prophet; also a place in Palestine
H1109.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H1112.derivation: or בֵּלְאשַׁצַּרlemma בֵּלְאשַׁצּר missing vowel, corrected to בֵּלְאשַׁצַּר; of foreign origin (compare H1095 (בֵּלְטְשַׁאצַּר));

H1115.derivation: constructive feminine of H1086 (בָּלָה) (equivalent to H1097 (בְּלִי));
H1115.strongs_def: properly, a failure of, i.e. (used only as a negative particle, usually with a prepositional prefix) not, except, without, unless, besides, because not, until, etc.
H1115.kjv_def: because un(satiable), beside, but, [phrase] continual, except, from, lest, neither, no more, none, not, nothing, save, that no, without.

H1116.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to be high);

H1118.derivation: probably from H4107 (מָהַל) with prepositional prefix; with pruning;

H1119.usage: with(3x), in(2x), into(1x), through(1x), for(1x), at(1x)

H1120.derivation: plural of H1116 (בָּמָה); heights; or (fully) בָּמוֹת בַּעַל; from the same and H1168 (בַּעַל); heights of Baal;
H1120.strongs_def: Bamoth or Bamoth-Baal, a place East of the Jordan

H1121.strongs_def: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
H1121.kjv_def: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch, breed, [phrase] (young) bullock, [phrase] (young) calf, [idiom] came up in, child, colt, [idiom] common, [idiom] corn, daughter, [idiom] of first, [phrase] firstborn, foal, [phrase] very fruitful, [phrase] postage, [idiom] in, [phrase] kid, [phrase] lamb, ([phrase]) man, meet, [phrase] mighty, [phrase] nephew, old, ([phrase]) people, [phrase] rebel, [phrase] robber, [idiom] servant born, [idiom] soldier, son, [phrase] spark, [phrase] steward, [phrase] stranger, [idiom] surely, them of, [phrase] tumultuous one, [phrase] valiant(-est), whelp, worthy, young (one), youth.
H1121.usage: old(135x), first(51x), man(20x), young(18x), child(10x), stranger(10x), people(5x)

H1123.strongs_def: {a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense}

H1125.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H40 (אֲבִימֶלֶךְ); (the) son of Abinadab;

H1126.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H205 (אָוֶן); son of my sorrow;
H1126.strongs_def: Ben-Oni, the original name of Benjamin

H1127.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H1397 (גֶּבֶר); son of (the) hero;

H1128.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and a derivative of H1856 (דָּקַר); son of piercing (or of a lance);

H1129.kjv_def: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

H1130.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H1908 (הֲדַד); son of Hadad;
H1130.strongs_def: Ben-Hadad, the name of several Syrian kings

H1132.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2105 (זוֹחֵת); son of Zocheth;

H1133.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2354 (חוּר); son of Chur;

H1134.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2428 (חַיִל); son of might;

H1135.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2605 (חָנָן); son of Chanan;

H1136.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2617 (חֵסֵד); son of kindness;

H1137.strongs_def: Bani, the name of five Israelites

H1139.derivation: from the plural construction of H1121 (בֵּן) and H1300 (בָּרָק);
H1139.strongs_def: sons of lightning, Bene-berak, a place in Palestine

H1141.derivation: or בּנָיָהוּ; (prolonged) from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has built;
H1141.strongs_def: Benajah, the name of twelve Israelites

H1142.derivation: from the plural of H1121 (בֵּן) and H3292 (יַעֲקָן); sons of Yaakan;
H1142.strongs_def: Bene-Jaakan, a place in the Desert

H1143.strongs_def: a double interval, i.e. the space between two armies

H1144.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H3225 (יָמִין); son of (the) right hand;
H1144.strongs_def: Binjamin, youngest son of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory

H1145.derivation: sometimes (with the article inserted) בֵּן־הַיּמִינִי; with H376 (אִישׁ) inserted (1 Samuel 9:1) בֶּן־אִישׁ ימִינִי; son of a man of Jemini; or shortened אִישׁ יְמִינִי; (1 Samuel 9:4; Esther 2:5) a man of Jemini, or (1 Samuel 20:1) simply יְמִינִיxlit Yᵉmînîy corrected to Yᵉmîynîy; a Jeminite; (plural) בְּנֵי יְמִינִיxlit Bᵉnîy corrected to Bᵉnêy; patron from H1144 (בִּנְיָמִין);
H1145.strongs_def: a Benjaminite, or descendent of Benjamin

H1148.derivation: probably from H1121 (בֵּן) with pron. suff.; our son;

H1151.derivation: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H5971 (עַם) with pronomial suffix; son of my people;

H1152.derivation: from H5475 (סוֹד) and H3050 (יָהּ) with prepositional prefix; in (the) counsel of Jehovah;

H1154.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be sour;

H1156.kjv_def: ask, desire, make (petition), pray, request, seek.

H1157.strongs_def: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
H1157.kjv_def: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

H1158.strongs_def: to gush over, i.e. to swell; (figuratively) to desire earnestly; by implication to ask
H1158.kjv_def: cause, inquire, seek up, swell out.

H1160.derivation: from H1197 (בָּעַר) (in the sense of burning); a lamp;
H1160.strongs_def: Beor, the name of the father of an Edomitish king; also of that of Balaam

H1162.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;
H1162.strongs_def: Boaz, the ancestor of David; also the name of a pillar in front of the temple

H1165.derivation: from H1197 (בָּעַר) (in the sense of eating);

H1166.derivation: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1167 (בַּעַל)
H1166.strongs_def: to be master; hence, to marry
H1166.kjv_def: have dominion (over), be husband, marry(-ried, [idiom] wife).

H1167.strongs_def: a master; hence, a husband, or (figuratively) owner (often used with another noun in modifications of this latter sense)
H1167.kjv_def: [phrase] archer, [phrase] babbler, [phrase] bird, captain, chief man, [phrase] confederate, [phrase] have to do, [phrase] dreamer, those to whom it is due, [phrase] furious, those that are given to it, great, [phrase] hairy, he that hath it, have, [phrase] horseman, husband, lord, man, [phrase] married, master, person, [phrase] sworn, they of.
H1167.usage: man(25x), owner(14x), husband(11x), have(7x), master(5x), adversary(1x), archers(1x), captain(1x)

H1168.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H1170.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H1285 (בְּרִית); Baal of (the) covenant;
H1170.strongs_def: Baal-Berith, a special deity of the Shechemites

H1171.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H1409 (גָּד); Baal of Fortune;

H1173.strongs_def: Baalah, the name of three places in Palestine

H1174.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and H1995 (הָמוֹן); possessor of a multitude;

H1175.kjv_def: Bealoth, in Aloth (by mistake for a plural from H5927 (עָלָה) with prepositional prefix).

H1176.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H2070 (זְבוּב); Baal of (the) Fly;
H1176.strongs_def: Baal-Zebub, a special deity of the Ekronites

H1177.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and H2603 (חָנַן); possessor of grace;
H1177.strongs_def: Baal-Chanan, the name of an Edomite, also of an Israelite

H1178.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and a modification of H2691 (חָצֵר); possessor of a village;

H1179.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and H2768 (חֶרְמוֹן); possessor of Hermon;

H1180.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) with pron. suff.; my master;
H1180.strongs_def: Baali, a symbolical name for Jehovah

H1181.derivation: from the plural of H1168 (בַּעַל) and the plural of H1116 (בָּמָה); Baals of (the) heights;
H1181.strongs_def: Baale-Bamoth, a place East of the Jordan

H1182.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H3045 (יָדַע); Baal has known;

H1183.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah (is) master;

H1184.derivation: from the plural of H1167 (בַּעַל) and H3063 (יְהוּדָה); masters of Judah;

H1185.derivation: probably from a derivative of H5965 (עָלַס) with prepositional prefix; in exultation;

H1186.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H4583 (מָעוֹן); Baal of (the) habitation (of) (compare H1010 (בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן));
H1186.strongs_def: Baal-Meon, a place East of the Jordan

H1187.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H6465 (פְּעוֹר); Baal of Peor;

H1188.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and the plural of H6556 (פֶּרֶץ); possessor of breaches;

H1189.derivation: from H1168 (בַּעַל) and H6828 (צָפוֹן) (in the sense of cold) (according to others an Egyptian form of Typhon, the destroyer); Baal of winter;

H1190.strongs_def: Baal of Shalishah, Baal-Shalishah, a place in Palestine

H1192.derivation: from H1172 (בַּעֲלָה) and H875 (בְּאֵר); mistress of a well;

H1193.derivation: from H1167 (בַּעַל) and H8558 (תָּמָר); possessor of (the) palm-tree;

H1194.derivation: probably a contraction of H1010 (בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן);
H1194.strongs_def: Beon, a place East of the Jordan

H1195.strongs_def: Banana, the name of four Israelite

H1196.derivation: from a derivative of H6031 (עָנָה) with prepositional prefix; in affliction
H1196.strongs_def: Baanah, the name of four Israelites

H1197.derivation: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1198 (בַּעַר)
H1197.strongs_def: to kindle, i.e. consume (by fire or by eating);  to be(-come) brutish
H1197.kjv_def: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.
H1197.usage: burn(41x), kindle(13x), brutish(7x), eaten(2x), set(2x), feed(1x), heated(1x), took(1x), wasted(1x)

H1198.strongs_def: properly, foot (as consumed); i.e. (by exten.) of cattle brutishness; (concretely) stupid
